title: 大阪杯の後に・眼光炯々

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(The crowd will never forget my run today! They'll
never forget my generation!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (I will surpass Creek!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: HAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Heavy panting...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(My flames raged to their extreme. I've mastered
the blaze fierce and water still!)

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki was unstoppable today! I couldn't
take my eyes off of her!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
But just imagine if Oguri Cap was here... She
totally would have won!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Well, she's injured. But yeah, who knows what
would have happened.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Still not good enough.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You were quite the force out there.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It was like the air around you kept getting hotter
and hotter. I was beginning to worry I might get
burned.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The same goes for you. I did all I could to avoid
being overwhelmed.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I feel like I've gotten a little closer to
knowing the real you. I like it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Think we'll get even closer next time? I can hardly
wait to find out.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...It's so hard to read her sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Did you see? I perfectly wielded my fierce blaze
today!
choice_data_list: Yeah! I could really see it in your running!
Yeah! I could really see it in your running!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Now that I have an obsession, everything has
become clear. I can focus myself entirely on the
path ahead of me!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My heart is blazing brighter than it ever has. I'm
certain it was my desire to beat Creek that drove
me forward.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And while the flames blazed, I didn't allow them
to run wild! They were under perfect control!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
All the same... It seems I've yet to leave a strong
enough impression on the audience.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I didn't run well enough to burn away the
impression Oguri has left in their hearts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. Even though Oguri Cap didn't run
today, I heard her name mentioned over and over
again.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It seems there's nothing to do but defeat Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to prove our worth, there's no
avoiding it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've found my obsession and perfected
my control over it, I'm sure I can win against her!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I want to face Oguri in my next race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, I heard that she is making a
speedy recovery and is eyeing her next race...
choice_data_list: I hear she'll be at the Yasuda Kinen.
I hear she'll be at the Yasuda Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Then I'd like to run in the Yasuda Kinen as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our goal is decided. Yaeno Muteki will
take on Oguri Cap in a pivotal race at the Yasuda
Kinen!
